items.title: Wikipedia — Dijkstra's algorithm
items.note: Reference for shortest-path with non-negative weights.

items.title: Wikipedia — Topological sorting (Kahn's algorithm)
items.note: Linear ordering of a DAG; cycle detection as a side effect.

items.title: NetworkX (Python)
items.note: General-purpose graph library; the de-facto choice for Python.

items.title: HNSW paper — Hierarchical Navigable Small World
items.note: Graph-based approximate nearest-neighbor search powering many vector databases.
